classes.name: PvtDropPath
classes.rationale: stochastic depth (drop path); composes from L1 ops (mul + scale); no specialized kb-nano file

classes.name: PvtPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection + LayerNorm + learned position embedding (interpolated); composes from L1

classes.name: PvtSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear projection + dropout (no LayerNorm/residual here, applied separately in PvtLayer); composes from L1

classes.name: PvtEfficientSelfAttention
classes.rationale: PVT-specific efficient attention with sequence-reduction conv (Conv2d + LN before K/V projection). No kb-nano file matches; would compose from L1/{linear, conv2d, layer_norm, sdpa, softmax}

classes.name: PvtFFN
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu') + fc2; non-encoder-style (no LayerNorm/residual fused); composes from L1/{linear, gelu}

classes.name: PvtLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln1 -> attention -> drop_path -> ln2 -> mlp -> drop_path

classes.name: PvtEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: hierarchical stack of PatchEmbeddings + PvtLayer blocks across stages

classes.name: PvtV2OverlapPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Overlap-patch Conv2d (with padding) + LayerNorm; composes from L1

classes.name: PvtV2DepthWiseConv
classes.rationale: depthwise Conv2d (groups=channels, kernel=3) for positional encoding

classes.name: PvtV2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: PVTv2 efficient attention with optional linear-attention pool branch (AdaptiveAvgPool2d) or sequence-reduction conv. No kb-nano file matches; would compose from L1/{linear, conv2d, adaptive_avg_pool2d, layer_norm, gelu, sdpa}

classes.name: PvtV2ConvFeedForwardNetwork
classes.rationale: fc1 + (optional ReLU for linear-attention) + DepthwiseConv positional + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu') + fc2. PVT-v2 specific Mix-FFN; composes from L1/{linear, conv2d, gelu, relu}

classes.name: PvtV2BlockLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln1 -> attention -> drop_path -> ln2 -> mlp -> drop_path

classes.name: PvtV2EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: patch_embedding + stack of PvtV2BlockLayer + final LayerNorm

classes.name: QianfanOCRDropPath
classes.rationale: stochastic depth (BEiT-style drop_path); composes from L1

classes.name: QianfanOCRVisionAttention
classes.rationale: empty subclass of InternVLVisionAttention: separate q/k/v + non-causal SDPA + optional QK-RMSNorm (BEiT/timm-style). Closest kb-nano is encoder_attention.py but that uses Linear bias=True and DenseAttention; InternVLVision differs by qk_norm option. No exact file; composes from L1/{linear, sdpa, rms_norm}

classes.name: QianfanOCRVisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu') + fc2 (no fused residual); same shape as EncoderIntermediate+EncoderOutput pattern

classes.name: QianfanOCRVisionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class with BEiT-style lambda_1/lambda_2 layer-scaling and drop_path1/drop_path2 around attention and MLP

classes.name: QianfanOCRVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: CLS token + patch_embed (Conv2d) + optional absolute position embeddings + interpolation

classes.name: QianfanOCRVisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring class: embeddings + stack of vision layers + final LayerNorm

classes.name: QianfanOCRMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: linear + activation + linear projection between vision and text; composes from L1

classes.name: Qwen2MLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj + SiLU); config.hidden_act='silu' -> SiluAndMul; matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: Qwen2RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: standard NeoX-style RoPE (Gemma2RotaryEmbedding has same compute as Llama RoPE)

classes.name: Qwen2Attention
classes.rationale: GQA with bias=True on QKV (Qwen2 specific) and optional sliding_window per layer_type; LlamaAttention in kb-nano supports bias and sliding_window via config knobs

classes.name: Qwen2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_layernorm -> attention + residual -> post_attention_layernorm -> mlp + residual

classes.name: Qwen2Model
classes.rationale: wiring: embed_tokens + stack of decoder layers + final RMSNorm + RoPE

classes.name: Qwen2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen2.py:249; standard Llama-style RMSNorm with elementwise weight

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniAudioAttention
classes.rationale: Whisper-style encoder self-attention with separate q/k/v, non-causal, varlen via cu_seqlens; matches WhisperEncoderSelfAttention in whisper_attention.py

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniAudioEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln -> self_attn -> residual -> ln -> fc1 -> GELU -> fc2 -> residual (Whisper-style layer)

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniAudioEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: 2x Conv1d stem + sinusoidal pos + stack of audio encoder layers + ln + AvgPool + projection

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen vision encoder attention: separate q/k/v + 2D rotary + non-causal varlen via cu_seqlens; matches VisionAttention pattern

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniVisionBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: norm1 -> attn -> residual -> norm2 -> mlp -> residual (Qwen vision block)

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: patch_embed + windowed attention + stack of vision blocks + merger

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Multi-modal RoPE (M-RoPE) for Qwen2-VL family text

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniAttention
classes.rationale: Llama-family GQA attention with M-RoPE and bias on QKV; uses kb-nano LlamaAttention with mrope rotary_emb passed externally

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniThinkerForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring: thinker (VLM with audio + vision + text)

classes.name: TimeDelayNetBlock
classes.rationale: TDNN block for ECAPA speaker encoder; composes from L1/{conv1d, batch_norm}

classes.name: Res2NetBlock
classes.rationale: Res2Net residual block; composes from L1

classes.name: SqueezeExcitationBlock
classes.rationale: channel-wise SE: conv -> relu -> conv -> sigmoid; composes from L1

classes.name: AttentiveStatisticsPooling
classes.rationale: weighted pooling with attention; composes from L1

classes.name: DiTInputEmbedding
classes.rationale: linear + position embedding for DiT input

classes.name: Qwen2_5_OmniAdaLayerNormZero
classes.rationale: AdaLN-Zero: time-conditioning LayerNorm with shift/scale/gate; matches AdaLayerNorm pattern

classes.name: DiTMLP
classes.rationale: DiT SwiGLU MLP (config has silu hidden_act, gate/up/down structure); maps to llama_mlp.py

classes.name: DiTAttention
classes.rationale: DiT self-attention with rotary + non-causal SDPA; closest is vision_attention.py but DiT has different shape conventions; composes from L1/{linear, sdpa, rotary}

classes.name: DiTTimestepEmbedding
classes.rationale: timestep embedding for DiT (sin pos + MLP)

classes.name: SnakeBeta
classes.rationale: Snake activation (x + sin(alpha*x)^2 / (alpha*beta)); not in kb-nano

classes.name: UpSample1d
classes.rationale: 1D upsampling for vocoder; composes from L1/{interpolate, conv1d}

classes.name: AMPBlock
classes.rationale: BigVGAN AMP block (Snake activation residual stack)

classes.name: Qwen2_5OmniForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring: omni VLM with thinker + talker + token2wav

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate/up/down + SiLU; config.hidden_act='silu'). Vision uses bias=True; text uses bias=False; both map to llama_mlp.py with bias knob

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VisionRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: 1D rotary frequency table for vision (h, w grids combined externally)

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLPatchMerger
classes.rationale: RMSNorm + flatten + fc1 + GELU + fc2 (use_postshuffle_norm=False); matches VisionPatchMerger

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen2-VL/2.5-VL vision attention with 2D rotary + cu_seqlens varlen; matches VisionAttention

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLVisionBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: norm1 -> attn -> residual -> norm2 -> mlp

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VisionTransformerPretrainedModel
classes.rationale: wiring: patch_embed + windowed attention + stack of vision blocks + merger

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen2_5_vl.py:545; M-RoPE for Qwen2-VL text (3D positional)

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLAttention
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen2_5_vl.py:672; Qwen2-style GQA attention (bias=True on QKV) with M-RoPE; LlamaAttention supports bias and external rotary_emb

classes.name: Qwen2_5_VLDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen2_5_vl.py:762; wiring: pre-attn norm -> attn -> pre-mlp norm -> mlp

classes.name: Qwen2AudioAttention
classes.rationale: Whisper-style encoder self-attention (separate q/k/v with k_proj bias=False, q/v/o bias=True), non-causal; matches WhisperEncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: Qwen2AudioEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln -> self_attn -> residual -> ln -> fc1 -> GELU -> fc2 -> residual (Whisper encoder layer pattern; activation_function='gelu')

classes.name: Qwen2AudioEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: 2x Conv1d stem + sinusoidal pos + stack of encoder layers + final ln + AvgPool

classes.name: Qwen2AudioMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: linear projection from audio -> text dim; composes from L1

classes.name: Qwen2AudioForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring: audio_encoder + projector + Qwen2 language model

classes.name: Qwen2MoeMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate/up/down + SiLU; config.hidden_act='silu'); matches llama_mlp.py

classes.name: Qwen2MoeAttention
classes.rationale: GQA with bias on QKV (config.qkv_bias) and optional sliding_window per layer; LlamaAttention supports both

classes.name: Qwen2MoeExperts
classes.rationale: grouped-GEMM expert bank with [gate_up, down] weights; matches L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py (used by L2/fused_experts.py)

classes.name: Qwen2MoeTopKRouter
classes.rationale: softmax routing with optional top-k norm; matches TopKSoftmax in L1

classes.name: Qwen2MoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: softmax routed experts + shared expert (Qwen2MoeMLP) gated by sigmoid linear; matches SharedExpertMoE pattern (routing='softmax', shared_expert_gate=True)

classes.name: Qwen2MoeModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + RMSNorm + RoPE

classes.name: Qwen2VLRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: M-RoPE: 3D position ids (T, H, W) for Qwen2-VL text

classes.name: PatchEmbed
classes.rationale: Conv3d-based patch embed for video/image (Qwen2-VL: bias=False)

classes.name: VisionMlp
classes.rationale: fc1 + QuickGELU (config.hidden_act='quick_gelu') + fc2; matches VisionMLP with QuickGELU

classes.name: VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen2-VL vision attention: separate q/k/v + 2D rotary + non-causal varlen via cu_seqlens

classes.name: Qwen2VLAttention
classes.rationale: Llama-family GQA with bias on QKV and M-RoPE; uses LlamaAttention with external rotary_emb

classes.name: Qwen2VisionTransformerPretrainedModel
classes.rationale: wiring: patch_embed + rotary + stack of VisionBlock + merger

classes.name: Qwen3Attention
classes.rationale: GQA with per-head q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm before RoPE + optional sliding_window; LlamaAttention supports qk_norm=True and sliding_window

classes.name: Qwen3DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3.py:294; wiring: input_ln -> attn -> post_attn_ln -> mlp

classes.name: Qwen3_5TextRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: interleaved M-RoPE (Qwen3VL inherits LlamaRotaryEmbedding with mrope_section)

classes.name: Qwen3_5GatedDeltaNet
classes.rationale: Qwen3-Next gated delta-net linear attention; reuses kb-nano qwen3_next_gdn_attention.py

classes.name: Qwen3_5Attention
classes.rationale: Qwen3-Next full attention with output gating + qk_norm + partial RoPE; same as kb-nano Qwen3NextAttention

classes.name: Qwen3_5RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Qwen3NextRMSNorm inherits Gemma3RMSNorm (1+weight pattern); maps to gemma_rms_norm.py

classes.name: Qwen3_5DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-attn-norm -> (linear_attn | full_attn) -> pre-mlp-norm -> mlp (alternating layer pattern)

classes.name: Qwen3_5TextModel
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid decoder (linear + full attention layers)

classes.name: Qwen3_5RMSNormGated
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3_5.py:175; gated RMSNorm used inside GatedDeltaNet

classes.name: Qwen3_5VisionMLP
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3_5.py:826; fc1 + GeluTanh (config.hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh') + fc2 vision MLP; closest is L2/gemma4_mlp.py but that is SwiGLU; actual is non-SwiGLU 2-layer; composes from L1/{linear, gelu}

classes.name: Qwen3_5VisionPatchMerger
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3_5.py:859; LN + flatten + fc1 + GELU + fc2 (use_postshuffle_norm option)

classes.name: Qwen3_5MoeAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen3-Next full attention (output gating, qk_norm, partial RoPE)

classes.name: Qwen3_5MoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: softmax routed experts + shared expert with sigmoid gate; matches SharedExpertMoE (routing='softmax', shared_expert_gate=True)

classes.name: Qwen3_5MoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid decoder layer (linear or full attention) + sparse MoE

classes.name: Qwen3_5MoeVisionMLP
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3_5_moe.py:919; fc1 + GeluTanh + fc2 (config.hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh'); composes from L1/{linear, gelu}

classes.name: Qwen3MoeAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen3 GQA attention with qk_norm + optional sliding_window; LlamaAttention supports qk_norm=True

classes.name: Qwen3MoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: routed experts ONLY (no shared expert) -- matches kb-nano Qwen3MoE in L2/qwen3_moe.py exactly

classes.name: Qwen3MoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_ln -> attn -> post_attn_ln -> sparse_moe_block (or dense MLP for mlp_only_layers)

classes.name: Qwen3NextRMSNormGated
classes.rationale: gated RMSNorm used in GatedDeltaNet (norm_before_gate=True, swish)

classes.name: Qwen3NextAttention
classes.rationale: GQA full attention with q_proj outputs 2x [Q, gate], qk_norm, partial RoPE, output*sigmoid(gate); matches Qwen3NextAttention in L2/qwen3_next_attention.py

classes.name: Qwen3NextGatedDeltaNet
classes.rationale: Linear-attention block with causal_conv1d + chunk_gated_delta_rule + RMSNormGated + out_proj; matches kb-nano qwen3_next_gdn_attention.py

classes.name: Qwen3NextMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (silu) — used as both dense MLP and shared-expert MLP

classes.name: Qwen3NextSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: softmax routed experts + shared expert with sigmoid gate; SharedExpertMoE (routing='softmax', shared_expert_gate=True) matches; arch-specific kb-nano qwen3_next_moe.py is also present

classes.name: Qwen3NextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid decoder layer (linear_attention or full_attention based on layer_types)

classes.name: Qwen3NextModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embed + decoder layers + RMSNorm + RoPE

classes.name: Qwen3OmniMoeAudioAttention
classes.rationale: Whisper-style audio encoder self-attention; matches WhisperEncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: Qwen3OmniMoeVisionPatchMerger
classes.rationale: Qwen3-VL patch merger pattern (LN + flatten + fc1 + GELU + fc2)

classes.name: Qwen3OmniMoeTalkerResizeMLP
classes.rationale: linear projection (resize) + activation; composes from L1

classes.name: Qwen3VLVisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + GeluTanh (config.hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh') + fc2 vision MLP. Not SwiGLU. kb-nano L2/gemma4_mlp.py is for SwiGLU GeluTanh-and-mul; this is plain 2-layer; composes from L1/{linear, gelu}

classes.name: Qwen3VLVisionPatchMerger
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + flatten + fc1 + GELU + fc2 (use_postshuffle_norm option for DeepStack)

classes.name: Qwen3VLVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen vision encoder attention (varlen, 2D rotary, non-causal)

classes.name: Qwen3VLTextAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen3 GQA with qk_norm but no sliding_window (deleted in init)

classes.name: Qwen3VLVisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision tower with DeepStack mergers

classes.name: Qwen3VLMoeTextTopKRouter
classes.rationale: softmax router with normalization (always on, no flag)

classes.name: Qwen3VLMoeTextSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: routed-only MoE (no shared expert), softmax routing; matches Qwen3MoE in L2/qwen3_moe.py

classes.name: Qwen3VLMoeTextAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen3-VL text attention (qk_norm, no sliding_window) with M-RoPE

classes.name: Qwen3VLMoeVisionMLP
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3_vl_moe.py:505; fc1 + GeluTanh + fc2 vision MLP (gelu_pytorch_tanh, non-SwiGLU); composes from L1

classes.name: Qwen3VLMoeTextMLP
classes.rationale: modeling_qwen3_vl_moe.py:292; SwiGLU MLP (silu) — text dense MLP for mlp_only_layers

classes.name: RagModel
classes.rationale: wiring: question_encoder (BERT-derived) + retriever + generator (BART/T5-derived). All compute is delegated to sub-models; this is pure orchestration.

classes.name: RecurrentGemmaSdpaAttention
classes.rationale: GQA local attention (sliding_window) with RoPE; LlamaAttention supports sliding_window

classes.name: RecurrentGemmaRglru
classes.rationale: Real-Gated Linear Recurrent Unit (Griffin/Hawk); kb-nano L1/rg_lru.py is faithful re-implementation

classes.name: RecurrentGemmaRecurrentBlock
classes.rationale: linear_x + linear_y (gates) -> causal_conv1d on x branch -> RG-LRU -> linear_out (with GeluTanh activation, config.hidden_activation='gelu_pytorch_tanh' on y branch)

classes.name: RecurrentGemmaMlp
classes.rationale: GeGLU pattern with GeluTanh (gate_proj + up_proj + down_proj, gate*up like SwiGLU but with gelu_pytorch_tanh activation). Closest is L2/gemma4_mlp.py (uses GeluAndMul('tanh')) which matches this pattern

classes.name: RecurrentGemmaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm -> (RecurrentBlock or SdpaAttention based on temporal_block_type) -> norm -> mlp

classes.name: AxialPositionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: axial 2D position embedding (sequence factored as h*w); no kb-nano file matches

classes.name: EfficientAttentionMixin
classes.rationale: Reformer mixin (utility methods); not an actual module

classes.name: LSHSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Locality-Sensitive-Hashing attention with hash buckets and chunk-based reordering. Reformer-specific; no kb-nano file matches; would need a new L1 op

classes.name: LocalSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Local windowed attention (chunked); Reformer-specific shape conventions; no kb-nano file matches

classes.name: ReformerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear projection (no LN/residual fused like BERT); composes from L1

classes.name: ReformerFeedForwardDense
classes.rationale: Linear + ReLU (config.hidden_act='relu') + Dropout; composes from L1/{linear, relu}

classes.name: ReformerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: reversible residual layer pair (attention + FF with reversible function)

classes.name: RegNetConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation (default ReLU); composes from L1

classes.name: RegNetShortCut
classes.rationale: 1x1 conv + bn shortcut for stride>1 paths

classes.name: RegNetSELayer
classes.rationale: channel SE: avg_pool + 2x conv1x1 + sigmoid; matches SE pattern

classes.name: RegNetXLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: 1x1 conv + 3x3 group conv + 1x1 conv + shortcut (ResNet-X bottleneck)

classes.name: RegNetModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + encoder + global avg pool

classes.name: RemBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word+pos+token_type embeddings + LayerNorm; matches BertEmbeddings (input_embedding_size projected separately is wiring detail)

classes.name: RemBertPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh on [CLS]; composes from L1

classes.name: RemBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with separate Q/K/V Linear (bias=True) + softmax + dense; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: RemBertEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of layers (with embedding_hidden_mapping_in projection)

classes.name: RemBertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm; composes from L1

classes.name: RemBertLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm + Linear (LM head); composes from L1

classes.name: ResNetConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation (ReLU default); composes from L1

classes.name: ResNetModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + encoder + global avg pool

classes.name: RobertaEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style embeddings (pad-aware position ids); matches XLMRobertaEmbeddings in encoder_embeddings.py

classes.name: RobertaCrossAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style cross-attention; not represented in kb-nano (encoder cross-attn rare for RoBERTa); composes from L1

classes.name: RobertaLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm + Linear; composes from L1

classes.name: RobertaSelfOutput
classes.rationale: modeling_roberta.py:333; Linear + LayerNorm + residual; matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: RobertaOutput
classes.rationale: modeling_roberta.py:391; Linear + LayerNorm + residual; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: RobertaPreLayerNormSelfOutput
classes.rationale: PreLayerNorm variant: Linear + Dropout (NO post-LN, since LN is now applied BEFORE attention); composes from L1 (different from EncoderSelfOutput which has LN)

classes.name: RobertaPreLayerNormIntermediate
classes.rationale: PreLayerNorm: LN + Linear + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu'); composes from L1/{layer_norm, linear, gelu}

classes.name: RobertaPreLayerNormOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (no post-LN); composes from L1

classes.name: RobertaPreLayerNormEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of layers + final LayerNorm (added vs BERT)

classes.name: RobertaPreLayerNormLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm + Linear; composes from L1

classes.name: RoCBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word+pos+token_type embeddings PLUS pronunciation/shape embeddings (RoCBert specific); composes from L1/embedding + L2/encoder_embeddings (extended)

classes.name: RoCBertLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attention + intermediate + output (with optional cross-attn for decoder mode)

classes.name: RoCBertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm; composes from L1

classes.name: RoFormerSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed sinusoidal position embedding (used as sin/cos source for rotary)

classes.name: RoFormerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: word + token_type + LayerNorm (NO learned position embedding; rotary applied in attention); composes from L1/{embedding, layer_norm}

classes.name: RoFormerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention BUT with rotary applied to Q/K (not standard EncoderSelfAttention which is non-rotary). Closest is encoder_attention.py + L1/rotary_emb.py applied externally; composes from L1/{linear, sdpa, rotary_emb}

classes.name: RoFormerPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm; composes from L1

classes.name: RTDetrMLP
classes.rationale: stacked Linear + ReLU stages (DETR-style MLP prediction head); matches RTDetrV2MLPHead

classes.name: RTDetrSelfAttention
classes.rationale: DETR-style multi-head self-attention with Linear Q/K/V + softmax; matches RTDetrV2MultiheadAttention

classes.name: RTDetrEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: transformer encoder layer (self-attn + FFN); matches RTDetrV2EncoderLayer

classes.name: RTDetrRepVggBlock
classes.rationale: RepVGG block (3x3 conv + 1x1 conv + activation); matches RTDetrV2RepVggBlock

classes.name: RTDetrCSPRepLayer
classes.rationale: CSP layer with RepVGG bottlenecks; matches RTDetrV2CSPRepLayer

classes.name: RTDetrMultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: multi-scale deformable attention (sampling offsets + attention weights + value aggregation); matches RTDetrV2MultiscaleDeformableAttention (uses L1/rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py)

classes.name: RTDetrSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D sine position encoding for spatial features; composes from L1

classes.name: RTDetrAIFILayer
classes.rationale: Attention-based In-Feature Interaction layer (one transformer encoder layer over flattened S5)

classes.name: RTDetrHybridEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: AIFI + CSP-Rep + lateral conv (hybrid encoder)

classes.name: RTDetrDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of decoder layers + intermediate prediction heads

classes.name: RTDetrResNetConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation; rt-detr ResNet backbone uses kb-nano rtdetrv2_resnet.py

classes.name: RTDetrResNetEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RT-DETR stem (3x ConvLayer + MaxPool); inside rtdetrv2_resnet.py
